BOLT.notes: PICK #492 NEXT — trivial admin/jarvis cleanup. Current iframe embed breaks OAuth/session flows on some browsers; replace with a single 'Otevřít v novém okně' button + optional description (target_blank rel=noopener noreferrer). Scope: src/app/(admin)/admin/jarvis/page.tsx (single file). Accept: button styled per admin shadcn conventions, tsc clean, lint 0w/0e MILESTONE preserved (~14 consecutive since C4829), build green. THEN #493 Resend→SMTP migration (LARGER SCOPE — plan in single commit if clean): (1) grep src/lib/email* + src/app/api/** for Resend client usage, (2) add nodemailer + @types/nodemailer, (3) create src/lib/email/smtp.ts using SMTP_HOST/SMTP_PORT/SMTP_USER/SMTP_PASS/SMTP_FROM env vars (vryp.cz mailserver — bectly provides creds), (4) keep Resend as env-gated fallback via EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend|smtp (default smtp), (5) update all send sites to go through unified sendMail() wrapper, (6) add .env.local.example entries, (7) Vercel env vars note in commit body for bectly to apply. Accept: all existing email flows (order confirm, shipped, review, abandoned cart, welcome, win-back) route through new wrapper, unit tests on src/lib/email pass, tsc clean, lint 0w/0e, build green. Each task ships as its own commit. Commit format: `Cycle #NNNN: Bolt — Task #NNN: <one-line>. tsc clean, lint 0w/0e (milestone preserved), build green.`

Scope must be strict: only affects @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, only adds the two pattern options, only ^_ prefix. Do NOT blanket-disable the rule. Do NOT add per-file overrides.
